title: PawPride Dog Cooling Mat - Cooling Mat for Dogs - Pressure-activated Cool Gel Technology Cool Mat for Dogs - Dog Summer Essentials - Non Toxic - Large
features: Dog Cooling Mat with Pressure Activated Gel Technology: Treat your furry friend to the ultimate comfort with our self-cooling mat for dogs cats. Featuring pressure-activated gel technology, this cushion instantly cools and soothes your pet upon contact, offering up to 4 hours of blissful relief on hot summer days.

Cool Down Your Canine: Simply lay the Pawpride cool mat for dogs where your four-legged friend loves to relax, and watch the magic happen. Our dog cooling mat works immediately, making it the ideal treat for senior dogs or those with health conditions, helping them beat the heat and stay comfortable.

No Water, Electricity, OR Refrigeration Required: Enjoy hassle-free cooling for your pet! Our Self-Cooling Pet Pad requires no plugging or freezing. As soon as your pooch sits down, the mat works automatically, providing refreshing relief. After up to 4 hours of use, it takes just 15-20 minutes of non-use to cool down again, perfect for those scorching summer days.

Relieves Joint Pain: Give your older, experienced pooch the gift of relief. The cool and soothing surface of our Pet Mat helps alleviate aching leg joints and hips, providing a more comfortable experience in their later years. Your beloved companion will thank you for this thoughtful comfort.

Cleans Easily, Portable, & Safe: Designed with convenience and safety in mind, our Self-Cooling Pet Mat is water-resistant and easy to clean, ensuring a hygienic space for your pet. Crafted from non-toxic materials, it's completely safe, even for occasional chewers. Lightweight and foldable, it effortlessly fits in cars, crates, and beds, making it a must-have item at home and on the road.

Upgrade your pet's comfort and well-being with the PawPride Self-Cooling Pet Mat. Whether it's relief from the summer heat or easing joint pain, this mat is the perfect companion for your furry family member, offering them the ultimate relaxation experience at home or on the go.
description: Product Description Effective Cooling for Your Pets All Summer Cooling Mats for Dogs and Cats Treat your furry friend to the ultimate comfort with our self-cooling mat for dogs cats. Self Cooling Pet Mat Features Cooling Relief For Your Pets The PawPride self cooling pet mat is perfect for keeping your pet's temperatures low if they are prone to overheating or for hot days. All they have to do is simply lay on it! Pressure Activated Gel Technology The PawPride self cooling pet mat is pressure activated, absorbs body heat and delivers cooling relief for pets by automatically cooling down when your pet sits on it. Stops Dehydration & Overheating The PawPride self cooling pet mat is perfect for those hot summer days to keep your furry friend’s temperature low so they do not overheat or dehydrate. WATERPROOF & EASY TO CLEAN The PawPride Self Cooling Pet Mat is water and spill resistant, making it easy to clean in case of any unfortunate accidents or spills.
